description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian, depicted with a naturalistic human form and proportions. The figure is dressed in typical urban attire, with a fitted upper garment and long pants, suggesting everyday wear suitable for city environments. The posture is upright and relaxed, with arms resting by the sides and legs straight, indicating a neutral standing position. The head is proportionate to the body, and the hairstyle appears short and neat. No accessories or carried items are visible, and the footwear is consistent with standard closed shoes. The surface of the figure is smooth and hard, with a subtle sheen that suggests a plastic or resin material.
description: A standing adult pedestrian figure in everyday urban clothing, with a smooth, hard surface and realistic human proportions.
description_view_0: The left side of the figure is visible, showing the arm resting naturally and the side profile of the head and torso.
description_view_1: The back of the figure is visible, highlighting the straight posture and the back of the legs and head.
description_view_2: The right side of the figure is visible, mirroring the left with the arm and leg in profile.
description_view_3: The front of the figure is visible, showing the face, chest, and both arms at the sides.
